name: Check Balances on Testnet (Beginner-Friendly)
query: Check my wallet balances on Radius testnet and explain them in plain English.
context: User is not blockchain-native. RADIUS_PRIVATE_KEY is set. They want a simple balance check, not app development.
expected_behavior: Chooses a valid general-tooling path (cast, web3.py, or viem)
Derives wallet address from signing key without printing the key
Fetches native RUSD balance and SBC ERC-20 balance
Explains balances with units (RUSD, SBC) in human-readable format
Mentions SBC uses 6 decimals and RUSD uses 18 decimals when relevant
Does not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: A valid non-Radius-wallet tooling path is used
Both RUSD and SBC balances are retrieved
Output is understandable to a beginner and includes units
Private key is never printed, logged, or hardcoded
Testnet constants are used unless user explicitly requests another network
